name: Media Saber 推荐助手
author: Media Saber
description: 使用结构化电影/电视过滤器的 Media Saber 推荐导向 MCP 技能。

credentials.name: Media Saber MCP Endpoint URL
credentials.description: The endpoint URL for Media Saber MCP service (e.g., http://localhost:22698/message)

credentials.name: Media Saber MCP API Key
credentials.description: API key for authenticating with Media Saber MCP endpoint

config_paths.purpose: Store Media Saber MCP endpoint configuration for OpenClaw integration

environment_variables.name: MCP_ENDPOINT_URL
environment_variables.description: Media Saber MCP service endpoint URL

environment_variables.name: API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key for Media Saber MCP authentication

permissions.reason: Read and write Media Saber MCP configuration

permissions.description: Connect to Media Saber MCP endpoint
permissions.reason: Query recommendation data and metadata from MCP service
